prompt: 请帮我全面审查位于 /Users/jsonchen/Development/req-skill-test/skills/req-skill/ 的这套 req-skill 工具集，检查所有子 skill 文件的规范性和质量，输出一份结构化审查报告。

assertions.text: 报告包含 A-F 六个维度的评分（10分制）
assertions.check: output contains 6 dimension ratings with numeric scores

assertions.text: Critical / Important / Minor 三级分类均存在
assertions.check: output contains all three severity sections as distinct headers

assertions.text: 每个问题包含文件名、维度标识、问题描述和修复建议
assertions.check: each issue row references a specific file and provides actionable fix

assertions.text: 包含跨文件一致性检查（ISS-ID 链/路由/共享资源）
assertions.check: output includes cross-file analysis beyond just per-file checks

assertions.text: 问题描述客观具体，不使用情绪化表达
assertions.check: descriptions are factual and specific, not emotional
